comments.body:
Hello Walid,

Good Day!

As FedEx is sunsetting the account integration using FedEx Web Services API, the account has to be added again using the new FedEx REST API.

The new integration option is already available in our app so that you can add your account and continue using it without any disruption.

Please refer to the following video explaining the process - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1w9yMMSHiZE

Let us know if you face any difficulties in the process. We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you further.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Walid,
 
Good Day!
 
As FedEx is sunsetting the account integration using FedEx Web Services API, the account has to be added again using the new FedEx REST API.
 
The new integration option is already available in our app so that you can add your account and continue using it without any disruption.
 
Please refer to the following video explaining the process - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1w9yMMSHiZE
 
Let us know if you face any difficulties in the process. We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you further.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
